vocab.example: Integrating Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư into classrooms is a double-edged sword; it offers personalized learning but lacks the moral guidance of a human.
Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư is bound to automate administrative tasks, but it can never replicate the empathy a teacher provides.
The idea of algorithms replacing professors gives us much food for thought regarding the future of human connection.

vocab.meaning: tạo ra lợi thế cho ai đó
vocab.example: Human teachers give students the edge by fostering critical thinking skills that Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư still struggles to master.

vocab.word: in the blink of an eye
vocab.meaning: trong chớp mắt (thay đổi rất nhanh)
vocab.example: Technology is evolving in the blink of an eye, yet the fundamental need for mentorship remains constant.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp tốc độ của cái gì
vocab.example: Educators must keep pace with technological advancements to ensure they aren't overshadowed by Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư tools.

vocab.meaning: mở đường cho, tạo điều kiện cho
vocab.example: Artificial intelligence will pave the way for a more customized curriculum, though teachers will still oversee the process.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác/yếu tố con người (nhân tính)
vocab.example: No matter how advanced software becomes, it will always lack the human touch required to inspire a discouraged student.

vocab.meaning: thay đổi hoàn toàn tình thế
vocab.example: Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư might turn the tide in education by making high-quality tutoring accessible to everyone, regardless of their location.

vocab.meaning: hợp tác chặt chẽ, khăng khít
vocab.example: In the future, I believe teachers and Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư will work hand in glove to create the ultimate learning experience.
